disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Israeli , Czech scientists recreate COVID - 19 evolution in lab
updates.summary_zh: 以色列和捷克科学家在实验室重现新冠病毒进化。

updates.title_en: U.S. Pays $750K to Evacuate American From Remote Island After She Was Aboard Hantavirus Cruise Ship: Report - People.com
updates.body_en: U.S. Pays $750K to Evacuate American From Remote Island After She Was Aboard Hantavirus Cruise Ship: Report People.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国花费75万美元从偏远岛屿撤离一名曾乘坐汉坦病毒邮轮的美国人。

updates.title_en: No hantavirus found in second Argentine province: ministry - ET HealthWorld
updates.body_en: No hantavirus found in second Argentine province: ministry ET HealthWorld
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷卫生部称第二个省份未发现汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center suspected hantavirus case in 38 - year - old male inmate ruled a false positive , officials say
updates.summary_zh: 圣昆廷康复中心一名38岁男性囚犯疑似汉坦病毒病例被确认为假阳性。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus ruled out for San Quentin inmate
updates.summary_zh: 美国圣昆廷监狱囚犯排除汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Officials say possible hantavirus case in San Quentin prison was false positive - Los Angeles Times
updates.body_en: Officials say possible hantavirus case in San Quentin prison was false positive Los Angeles Times
updates.summary_zh: 美国圣昆廷监狱疑似汉坦病毒病例为假阳性。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On MV Hondius Cruise Exposes Hidden Agricultural Threat - Eurasia Review
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On MV Hondius Cruise Exposes Hidden Agricultural Threat Eurasia Review
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius邮轮汉坦病毒爆发暴露农业威胁。

updates.title_en: PAHO and partners strengthen surveillance of hantavirus and other hemorrhagic fevers in the Americas - Pan American Health Organization (PAHO)
updates.body_en: PAHO and partners strengthen surveillance of hantavirus and other hemorrhagic fevers in the Americas Pan American Health Organization (PAHO)
updates.summary_zh: 泛美卫生组织加强美洲汉坦病毒监测。

updates.title_en: Officials investigating possible hantavirus case in San Quentin prison with inmates, staff monitored for symptoms - Hanford Sentinel
updates.body_en: Officials investigating possible hantavirus case in San Quentin prison with inmates, staff monitored for symptoms Hanford Sentinel
updates.summary_zh: 美国圣昆廷监狱调查疑似汉坦病毒病例，囚犯和工作人员接受症状监测。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus One-Shot mRNA Vaccine Fully Protects in Syrian Hamster Model - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus One-Shot mRNA Vaccine Fully Protects in Syrian Hamster Model Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒单次mRNA疫苗在叙利亚仓鼠模型中完全保护。
